description: A project developer needs to file a formal grid interconnection request with the ISO/RTO for a new solar project.

nodes.task_description: Identify the correct interconnection request form and required technical studies for the project's size and location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides links to the correct forms and a list of required studies (e.g., Feasibility, System Impact).

nodes.task_description: Compile all necessary project data, including single-line diagrams, inverter specifications, and site layout.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all required technical documentation.

nodes.task_description: Complete the interconnection request application and attach all required documents for submission.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a completed application package ready for filing.
